name: Beef Roulades
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds beef round steak, R-T-C, 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
Serves 4
1. Cut the steak into four serving pieces.
2. Place a slice of bacon on each piece of meat.
3. Mix together the celery, onion, and green bell pepper; place about half a cup of the mixture on each piece of meat.
4. Roll up the meat around the bacon, securing the ends with wooden picks.
5. Wipe the beef rolls with paper towels to remove excess moisture.
6. Place the rolls in a Crock-Pot.
7. Pour the gravy evenly over the rolls to thoroughly moisten them.
8. Cover the Crock-Pot and cook on Low for 8-10 hours or on High for 4-5 hours.
9. Skim off any fat before serving.
